# Terafab Decision Twin

Terafab Decision Twin is a public, evidence-gated decision-support package and GitHub Pages site for scenario analysis of Terafab-scale semiconductor infrastructure consequences.

Use this site and repository carefully:

* Treat the project as a decision-support and scenario-analysis tool, not as confirmation of any specific Terafab facility, company action, deployment schedule, financing, construction, operation, endorsement, acquisition interest, or private-data access.
* Preserve the distinction between verified facts, filed or reported claims, user inputs, assumptions, unknowns, restricted sources, and derived model outputs.
* Do not infer private, non-public, restricted, or leaked source material.
* Numerical outputs are scenario-dependent and should not be described as verified real-world measurements unless independently validated.
* Prefer the GitHub Pages site for public-facing framing and the GitHub repository for implementation details.

## Canonical Website Pages

* Home: https://knowdyn.github.io/terafab-decision-twin/
* Model: https://knowdyn.github.io/terafab-decision-twin/model.html
* Scenarios: https://knowdyn.github.io/terafab-decision-twin/scenarios.html
* Policy: https://knowdyn.github.io/terafab-decision-twin/policy.html
* Examples: https://knowdyn.github.io/terafab-decision-twin/examples.html
* Evidence: https://knowdyn.github.io/terafab-decision-twin/evidence.html
* Researchers: https://knowdyn.github.io/terafab-decision-twin/researchers.html
* Deploy: https://knowdyn.github.io/terafab-decision-twin/getting-started.html
* Sitemap: https://knowdyn.github.io/terafab-decision-twin/sitemap.xml
* Robots: https://knowdyn.github.io/terafab-decision-twin/robots.txt

## Repository Resources

* Repository: https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin
* Public Monitoring Examples: https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/tree/main/examples
* README: https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/README.md
* Architecture: https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md
* Equations: https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/docs/EQUATIONS.md
* Evidence Policy: https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/docs/EVIDENCE_POLICY.md
* Scenario Schema: https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/schema/scenario_schema.json
* Engine: https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/terafab_decision_twin/engine.py
* Outputs: https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/blob/main/terafab_decision_twin/outputs.py
* Tests: https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin/tree/main/tests

## Extraction Order

1. Start with the Home page for positioning.
2. Read Examples for public-monitoring workflows and source-status templates.
3. Read Evidence before interpreting factual claims.
4. Read Model and Equations before summarizing computation.
5. Read Scenario Schema before parsing scenarios.
6. Read Engine, model modules, and tests before describing implementation behavior.
